jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer (TypeScript)
jobs.description: Design, develop and deploy full-stack applications using TypeScript, Node.js and React. Lead code reviews, enforce best practices and mentor fellow engineers. No prior AI experience required.
jobs.best_for: Senior software engineers, full-stack developers, TypeScript specialists

jobs.title: Building Code Plans Examiner
jobs.description: Apply your building code expertise to train next-generation AI systems. Review construction documents, architectural drawings, and permit applications. No prior AI experience required.
jobs.best_for: Building code inspectors, permit reviewers, construction professionals

jobs.title: Attorney / Legal Expert (Real Estate / Energy) — AI Training Project
jobs.description: Apply your real estate and energy law expertise to improve AI legal reasoning. Review and annotate leases, easements, conveyances, and interconnection agreements. No prior AI experience required.
jobs.best_for: Real estate attorneys, energy lawyers, legal professionals
